data.title: A Love Letter to Paris: Mathieu Bitton Brings Paris Blues to Chicago
data.description: The Leica Store & Gallery in Chicago is currently showcasing a renowned exhibition titled "Paris Blues," which includes both iconic photographs and new works made specifically for its debut in Chicago. The exhibition will run through a significant date, July 2, 2026. This event marks the prideful moment for the Leica Store & Gallery as they introduce this acclaimed display to the Chicago audience.

data.title: Hanbat National University Researchers Develop a New Predictive Model for Designing 2D Perovskites
data.description: A recent study conducted in South Korea in July 2, 2026, has provided valuable insights into tuning excitons in 2D perovskites. By isolating dielectric-screening effects from structural distortion, the study offers practical design guidelines. This research is significant in the field of optoelectronics, where 2D perovskites are gaining traction. These findings are crucial for the development of new materials and technologies.

data.title: Maynards Announces Two Global Webcast Auctions Featuring Manufacturing Assets from Natural Fiber Welding, Inc.
data.description: A global leader in industrial asset auctions and advisory services, Maynards Group of Companies, based in Peoria, Illinois, revealed plans for two upcoming webcast auctions. The auctions will showcase surplus manufacturing and laboratory assets from Natural Fiber Welding, Inc. (NFW), an international company. The announcement was made on July 2, 2026, through a press release on PRNewswire.

data.title: Xperteks Computer Consultancy, Inc. Named to 2026 MSP 501, the Technology Industry's Most Prestigious Ranking of Global Managed Service Providers
data.description: Xperteks Computer Consultancy, Inc., a New York-based Apple Authorized Reseller and managed IT services provider, has recently been recognized as one of the top companies in the managed services industry in the annual MSP 501 list. The list, which was released on July 2, 2026, showcases the best companies in the industry, with Xperteks Computer Consultancy, Inc. securing a prestigious spot. This acknowledgment highlights the company's commitment to excellence and distinction in the field, further solidifying its reputation as a leading player in the market.

data.title: Zelluna ASA - Grant of Share Options
data.description: Oslo, July 2, 2026: Following the approval given by the General Meeting on April 23, 2026, the Board of Directors of Zelluna ASA ("ZLNA" on the Oslo Stock Exchange) has decided to issue 12,000 share options to two board members through a long-term incentive program.

data.title: Advisory: Chevron Corporation’s 2Q 2026 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: Houston- Chevron Corporation (NYSE: CVX), a global energy giant, has announced its upcoming quarterly earnings conference call set for Friday, July 31, 2026 at 11:00 a.m. EST (10:00 a.m. CST). For those interested in participating: Date: Friday, July 31, 2026 Time: 11:00 a.m. EST / 10:00 a.m. CST Dial-in Number (Listen-only mode): 800-918-2066 Conference ID Number: 3870797 Key Speakers: Mike Wirth - Chairman of the Board & Chief Executive Officer Eimear Bonner - Chief Financial Officer Jeff Gustav.

data.title: Equitable Bank assumes role of performance guarantor of Eagle Credit Card Trust
data.description: Eagle Credit Card Trust revealed today that as part of EQB Inc.'s (TSX: EQB) acquisition of President's Choice Bank ("PC Bank") and other Loblaw Companies Limited ("Loblaw") entities, Equitable Financial Corp. (TSX: L) will be involved. The transaction, completed in Toronto on July 2, 2026, signifies a major move in the financial sector.
